product_results.title: JETech Magnetic Silicone Case for iPhone 16 Pro 6.3-Inch, Compatible with MagSafe, Silky Soft Touch, Shock Absorbing Phone Cover with Camera Lens Full Protection (Midnight Green)

summary.text: Customers find this cellular phone case to be of very good quality. The case protects phones well and provides comprehensive camera protection. The magnetic attachment features a decent magnet with powerful magnetic strength. MagSafe works perfectly and functions great with magnetic powerbanks. The case offers a silky smooth feel with a lovely texture. Customers are satisfied with the fit, grip, and color options.

authors_reviews.title: Great case for a Desert Titanium iPhone 16 Pro
authors_reviews.text: I bought 3 Magsafe cases (one transparent, one leather and this one), which were much better than the other cases for a fraction of the price. The cut-out is perfect for using the Camera Control without interfering too much (I cannot say the same for the other cases). Colour makes the gold pop out a lot and makes it feel luxurious. Very soft touch while still grippy and felt of good quality to last a long while. It seems even much nicer than the Apple silicon case.
authors_reviews.author: Stephane Renaud

authors_reviews.title: A good product at a good price
authors_reviews.text: It's a little thicker than the iPhone 11 Pro case I was using (my previous phone), so my iPhone 16 Pro feels a little bulkier. I'm sure I'll adjust to the change fine over a bit of time. I'm having a bit of trouble keeping a USBC cord in the charging port of the phone and I think it's because the case is a little thicker. We've seen this with other cases + charging cords over the years. No slip with it, which important on our boat. Overall a good product at a good price
authors_reviews.author: detneribo

authors_reviews.title: Great case!
authors_reviews.text: Very aesthetic, great quality, perfect fit on my phone. Strong magnet for my MagSafe. Will purchase again!
authors_reviews.author: Sarah M

authors_reviews.title: Love it
authors_reviews.text: Came as described. The color is nice and it works with my magnetic charger.
authors_reviews.author: Bethany

authors_reviews.title: Wireless chargers don’t work with case
authors_reviews.text: Overall I like the charger but it doesn’t work 50% of the time with my wireless charger. My chargers are fine with my other phones
authors_reviews.author: Kristian A
